ddls:
CREATE TABLE "campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each campaign */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "budget" REAL /* Allocated budget for the campaign */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Company name associated with the campaign */,
  "client_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the client */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the campaign */,
  "objective" TEXT /* Primary objective of the campaign */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Description of the target audience */,
  "platforms" TEXT /* List of advertising platforms used */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the campaign was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the campaign was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "creative_sets" (
  "creative_set_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each creative set */,
  "campaign_id" TEXT /* Reference to the campaign to which the creative set belongs */,
  "set_name" TEXT /* Name of the creative set */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the creative set */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the creative set */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the creative set was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the creative set was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("creative_set_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_creative_sets_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "creative_instances" (
  "creative_instance_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each creative instance */,
  "creative_set_id" TEXT /* Reference to the creative set to which the instance belongs */,
  "headline" TEXT /* Headline or main text of the creative */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image associated with the creative */,
  "alt_text" TEXT /* Alternative text for the image */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the creative instance */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the creative instance was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the creative instance was last updated */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the creative instance for A/B testing */,
  "is_live" INTEGER /* Indicates if the creative instance is currently live */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("creative_instance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_creative_instances_creative_set_id FOREIGN KEY ("creative_set_id") REFERENCES creative_sets ("creative_set_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "campaign_id" TEXT /* Reference to the campaign associated with the metrics */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views the campaign received */,
  "clicks" INTEGER /* Number of clicks generated by the campaign */,
  "conversions" INTEGER /* Number of conversions achieved by the campaign */,
  "spend" REAL /* Total amount spent on the campaign */,
  "impressions" INTEGER /* Number of impressions the campaign received */,
  "click_through_rate" REAL /* Click-through rate (CTR) of the campaign */,
  "conversion_rate" REAL /* Conversion rate of the campaign */,
  "cost_per_click" REAL /* Cost per click (CPC) of the campaign */,
  "cost_per_conversion" REAL /* Cost per conversion (CPA) of the campaign */,
  "engagement_rate" REAL /* Engagement rate of the campaign */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date on which the performance metrics were recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, manager, analyst) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_campaign_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who has access */,
  "campaign_id" TEXT /* ID of the campaign the user has access to */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access the user has */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the access was granted */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the access was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_campaign_access_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_campaign_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "campaign_id" TEXT /* Reference to the campaign being evaluated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback provided by the user */,
  "date_submitted" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was submitted */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user */,
  "is_anonymous" INTEGER /* Indicates if the feedback is anonymous */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the feedback was submitted */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the feedback was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_feedback_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
